scope: TG-P2 route-bound proof (gfx1100, one process per scenario; getenv @cache -> env fixed at import)
harness: scratchpad tg_p2_route_bound.py: builds a real Q4KPrimitiveLinear, spies q4k_g3_lanemap_gemv_kernel vs q4k_gemv_warp_kernel

scenarios.proves: QK_ROUTE_POLICY is the selector authority: G3 fires even with the DECODE_Q4K_G3_ANYSHAPE default disabled
owned warp remains one rollback flag away (BUBBLEBEAM_FUTURESIGHT=0 -> reference path)

scenarios.raised: ValueError: TG_P2_BLOCKED_HIDDEN_FALLBACK: QK_ROUTE_POLICY selects decode_q4k_g3_generated for Q4_K tensor 'blk.0.route_bound_4096_512.weight' (out=4096, in=512) but it did not bind to the G3 route
scenarios.proves: strict mode fails loud on hidden fallback for a policy-selected tensor that cannot bind to G3

token_identity.basis: no-policy default vs policy-selected G3 on 4096x4096, identical words/x
token_identity.note: same generated G3 kernel both ways -> bit-identical output; no-policy default byte-unchanged
